findings: Firmware exports raw body-frame acceleration in GET_STATUS and TEL, not de-gravitated linear acceleration.
Current host-side /imu/data.linear_acceleration therefore reflects raw accelerometer specific-force semantics.
Existing mapping body_z <- sensor_x is not disproven by the user's mounting description and measured static data.
imu_accel_valid had been gated by norm checks but not by an installation-aware static gravity direction check.
